title: [Lirafyr Cottage, Library]
description: Entering into the base of the large sequoia tree, the air has a strong, albeit pleasant, scent of fresh cut lumber.  Stairs jut outwards from the timber giant, spiraling upwards into the darkness above, while the remaining spaces have been carved into built-in shelves filled with books.  Completing the cozy room is a large riverstone fireplace imbedded into the northern wall with a dark velvet loveseat settled nearby.
